name: client-onboard-agent

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes:
POST /webhook/client-onboard-agent

Expected body:
{
  url, context_dump, offer_brief,
  potential_icps: [{name, tier, note}, ...],
  client_name, client_code
}

nodes.name: Fetch URL
nodes.notes:
Pre-scrape the client URL. Pass output to the agent as primary context.
If this fails, the agent still runs from web_search alone.

parameters.systemMessage: PASTE THE CONTENTS OF prompts/onboarding-agent-system.md HERE (or load via $vars / external file)

nodes.name: Anthropic — Opus 4.7
nodes.notes:
Replace {systemMessage} with the actual contents of prompts/onboarding-agent-system.md.

Enable web_search tool — see https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/agents-and-tools/tool-use/web-search-tool

Max tokens 60K (output is verbose JSON for N ICPs).
Temperature 0.6 — slight diversity but not chaotic.

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook
nodes.notes: Returns { brand_profile: {...}, icps: [...] } to the onboarding page.

_README: Import this JSON in n8n via the import workflow menu.
1. Replace the systemMessage in the 'Anthropic — Opus 4.7' node with the contents of prompts/onboarding-agent-system.md
2. Add your Anthropic API credential to that node
4. Verify the public webhook URL matches CLIENT_ONBOARD_AGENT in config.js (https://n8n.dtthomas.cloud/webhook/client-onboard-agent)
Stress test before shipping by sending a curl POST with sample payload.
